hero.label: Make a Difference
hero.title: Donate to RAPP
hero.subtitle: Your generosity directly funds peacebuilding, education, and community development across Rwanda.

impacts.desc: Provides school supplies for one child for a month.
Plants 25 trees and supports a local reforestation worker.
Covers a community health visit for five families.
Funds one day of a peacebuilding dialogue session.
Sponsors one month of youth leadership training.
Supports a women's cooperative for a full quarter.

otherWays.title: Bank Transfer
otherWays.desc: Contact us for direct bank transfer details in USD, EUR, or RWF.

otherWays.title: Mobile Money
otherWays.desc: Donate via MTN Mobile Money or Airtel Money from anywhere in Rwanda.

otherWays.title: In-Kind Donations
otherWays.desc: Donate goods, equipment, expertise, or volunteer your time and skills.

otherWays.title: Corporate Giving
otherWays.desc: Set up a corporate matching programme or CSR partnership with RAPP.
